title: Apply for a work permit from inside Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Work permit: Applying from inside Canada
Check if you can apply from outside Canada or at a port of entry (POE) .
Most foreign nationals need a work permit to work in Canada. You may be eligible for an employer-specific or open work permit.
Check processing times
$155  (unless exempt )

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
